arts.ttl: Manuel Neuer hints at Bayern Munich contract extension happening soon
arts.sum: From what the club’s front office has been saying about the trio of deals, it looks like all three will get done and announced in a matter of time, but the clock has been ticking as all three players have current contracts set to expire this summer. Straight from the horse’s mouth, it is becoming more clear that Neuer will coon put pen to paper on one-year contract extension at Bayern, it is just a matter of time before the club announces such.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich among host of European teams eyeing Club Brugge midfielder Raphael Onyedika
arts.sum: Bayern, Borussia Dortmund, Porto and AC Milan have made enquiries about Club Brugge’s Nigerian midfielder Raphael Onyedika (23). Bayern Munich has been strengthening their midfield group, starting with Tom Bischof from Hoffenheim on a free transfer and the returns of Aleksandar Pavlović and João Palhinha for selection.

arts.ttl: Tottenham agree £50m deal for Bayern's Tel - Friday's gossip
arts.sum: Tottenham agree £50m deal with Bayern Munich for Mathys Tel, Al-Nassr plot £90m offer for Brighton's Kaoru Mitoma, Ollie Watkins open to joining Arsenal, plus more.

arts.ttl: Mathys Tel turns down Tottenham move
arts.sum: Multiple reports claim that Mathys Tel has turned down the opportunity to join Tottenham.

arts.ttl: “Mathys Tel will make his own way” — Aleksandar Pavlović supports his friend no matter what happens
arts.sum: Such big exit news saw reporters ask the Bayern players about their thoughts after the Champions League win over ŠK Slovan Bratislava. Pavlović, as one of those players, emphasized his support for Tel wherever he goes: “Mathys is a great guy and a big friend of mine,” Pavlović said, via @iMiaSanMia .

arts.ttl: Report: Tottenham are now on the verge of signing 'outstanding' player after Mathys Tel rejected them
Mathys Tel: Tottenham learn transfer decision of Bayern Munich forward
arts.sum: Tottenham are one of several Premier League teams interested in signing Bayern Munich's Mathys Tel.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: What Manchester United have now done after Mathys Tel snubs Tottenham offer
arts.sum: TBR Football can exclusively confirm that Manchester United have leapt into action following Mathys Tel’s decision to snub Tottenham Hotspur. Manchester United are after new...

arts.ttl: Man Utd Ready to Hijack Another Tottenham Transfer After Mathys Tel
arts.sum: With eyes on Mathys Tel, Manchester United have reportedly got another Spurs target lined up.

arts.ttl: Mathys Tel makes Tottenham transfer decision as Man Utd, Arsenal and Chelsea stance emerges
arts.sum: Mathys Tel wants to leave Bayern Munich before transfer deadline day and Tottenham stole a march on multiple Premier League rivals by agreeing a £50million deal with the German giants on Thursday
